title: jay medical
description: A hardcore medical and downed system mod for zombie apocalypse and realistic survival gameplay. Features bleeding, fractures, painkillers, reviving, adrenaline injections, and immersive multiplayer combat injuries.
body:
Jay Medical is a hardcore medical system mod for Minecraft Forge 1.20.1, designed for zombie apocalypse, realistic survival, and multiplayer gameplay.

Features:
- Downed and revival system
- Bleeding mechanics
- Fracture system
- Painkiller effects
- Medical supplies
- Adrenaline syringe
- Surgery kit
- First aid items

This mod is designed for hardcore survival modpacks, zombie apocalypse servers, and immersive multiplayer experiences.
